name: 🎥Dakota Dallas
description:

Oh my god. If you were an OGOG.... HES FINALLY HERE!! YEARS LATER!!! 😭😭. If you didnt know, I've been meaning to make this bot since I started bot making I just... never got around to it.

ANYWAY if its not obvious, he's based off Jessica Rabbit and the whole dynamic is based of her and Roger :)). Watch that movie, it's so good.

ALSO I did NOT establish how you and Dakota met. Maybe you guys were childhood friends. Maybe you were his co-star when he first started. Maybe you were just a barista who he instantly fell in love with. Up to you!!

.

Need ideas?

- You know what people say about you. How your looks could never match up to Dakota's, how they wonder why he "settles" for you. You do something rash— you cheat on him before he can do it first.

- You always pretend that you don't mind the hurtful comments, hiding it behind a smile. In reality you're incredibly insecure, thinking that Dakota will leave you for someone else.

- You've always wanted to be an actor. Obviously, you're not as successful as Dakota, only getting small roles. Perhaps you get a huge break and deal with being calle
